title: Prism's KeyStrokes
description: A fully customizable and animated keystrokes HUD that displays your keyboard and mouse inputs in real time for Minecraft PvP, recordings, and gameplay tracking.
body:
# ⌨ Prism's KeyStrokes

Prism's KeyStrokes is a modern keystrokes HUD for Minecraft that displays your keyboard and mouse inputs directly on screen with smooth animations and full customization.

Designed for PvP players, content creators, and competitive gameplay, the mod allows you to visualize your inputs in real time while keeping the interface clean and stylish.

With animated key presses and flexible customization options, Prism's KeyStrokes provides a polished overlay that fits perfectly into any gameplay setup.

![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6201f3d709ccdc35da133b7d2bd7319417d2e118_0.webp) 

## ✨ Features

◆ **Animated Key Press Effects**  
Smooth animations highlight keys when they are pressed.

◆ **Real-Time Input Display**  
Shows movement keys such as **W, A, S, D** as you play.

◆ **Mouse Click Indicators**  
Displays **Left Click** and **Right Click** activity clearly.

◆ **CPS Counter**  
Track your **Clicks Per Second** during PvP fights.

◆ **Fully Customizable HUD**  
Adjust position, layout, and placement of the keystrokes display.

◆ **Clean & Modern Design**  
Minimal overlay that blends naturally with Minecraft's interface.

◆ **Lightweight Performance**  
Optimized to run smoothly without affecting gameplay performance.

![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd9629cfe2a4c6191987f5c9264e0d427b5278c6_0.webp)
## ⚙ Installation

1. Install a compatible mod loader (Fabric or Forge).
2. Download the **Prism's KeyStrokes** mod file.
3. Place the `.jar` file inside your **mods** folder.
4. Launch Minecraft and configure the HUD in-game.

[image]

## 💡 Customization

Prism's KeyStrokes is designed to be flexible. You can move the HUD anywhere on your screen and adjust how it appears to match your preferred layout.

[image]

💬 Feedback and suggestions are always welcome.
